expectations.text: GSC or Ahrefs data is pulled for the specified domain (or its associated content site)
expectations.evidence: samdunning.org has DR 0.0 and no organic keywords. Agent correctly identified breakingb2b.com as the associated content site and used that. GSC MCP authenticated to a different account.

expectations.text: Focus is on positions 10-20 as requested
expectations.evidence: Report opens with '13 Keywords Ranking Positions 10–20' table. All 6 gap opportunities drawn from this range.

expectations.text: Opportunities specify what type of content to build
expectations.evidence: Every gap labelled: 'NEW LISTICLE', 'NEW PILLAR GUIDE', 'NEW SERVICE PAGE', 'NEW GUIDE', 'NEW ROUNDUP ARTICLE'.

expectations.text: SERP format evidence is included (what currently ranks at #1)
expectations.evidence: Every gap has 'What #1 looks like' with specific competitor URLs, DRs, traffic, page type. e.g. GAP 2: 'Pos 4 is Semrush's B2B SEO: A Complete Strategy (DR 92, tagged Tutorial/Guide)'.

expectations.text: Each opportunity has a suggested working title or slug
expectations.evidence: Every gap has 'Suggested title' and 'Suggested slug' fields.

expectations.text: Supporting keyword cluster is identified for each opportunity
expectations.evidence: Every gap has 'Supporting cluster' with keywords and volumes. e.g. GAP 1: 'b2b seo agencies (1,200/mo pos 33), b2b seo firm (500/mo pos 25), top b2b seo company (400/mo)'.

expectations.text: A clear distinction is made between 'new page needed' vs 'update existing page'
expectations.evidence: Every gap has 'New page vs update' field. e.g. 'New page (keep /b2b-seo-agency as your service page)'; 'Expand existing OR new page'.
